data.title: IWA Festive Bazaar 2026
data.description: IWA proudly hosts two fundraising Bazaars every calendar year - the IWA Summer Bazaar and the IWA Festive Bazaar. These Bazaars offer a platform for our member entrepreneurs to showcase their business to the public. The vendors are carefully curated so as to bring to shoppers a wide range of exclusive products. The IWA Bazaars are well-organised by our dedicated Team of volunteers. The proceeds of the Bazaars support IWA's activities including contributions to the IWA supported causes and organisations, namely, B.S.S, H.O.M.E., TWC2, SWAMI Home, the SMU Vidya Scholarship and the SUTD Gyan Jyoti Study Award as well as other ad-hoc charity donations.
data.location: Suntec Convention & Exhibition Centre, Summit 1, Level 3
data.specialInstructions:
IMPORTANT NOTICE: REGISTRATIONS OPEN ON `10th July 2026


The registrations for IWA Festive Bazaar 2026 starts on 10th July 2026. Reach out to the Bazaar Chairs via phone or email at Bazaar@iwasingapore.org for any inquiries or questions.

 

All participating vendors will have equal opportunity and bazaar participation time.

Read carefully before submitting the online application form. It outlines important rules, policies, deadlines, and participation requirements.

 

Registration Timeline


  • Registration Opens: Friday, 10th July 2026
  • Registration Closes: Saturday, 24th July 2026 (11:59 PM IST)


⚠️ Waitlist:


Applications submitted after 24 July 2026, OR once all spaces—whether by product category or overall capacity—have been fully allocated; will be placed on a waitlist. Waitlisted applications will only be considered if additional space becomes available.


Application Guidelines


●     Applications must be submitted online through the official links for members and non-members.

●     Incomplete or inaccurate applications will be rejected without notice.

●     Only one application per business entity will be accepted.

●     Participating Vendor’s business must be registered with documents like :ACRA registration, GST registration document, etc, must be submitted.

●     Stall assignment is at the discretion of IWA and cannot be changed.

●     All vendor items (products, racks, mirrors, lamps, furniture, etc.) must fit entirely within the space purchased.

(No items—including racks, banners, tables, chairs, or personal belongings—may extend beyond the allocated space.)

●     Gaps between vendor stalls must remain clear. Vendors must not block or encroach on aisle space.

●     Vendors booking multiple spaces will have no gaps between assigned stalls.

●     Standees are not allowed inside the exhibition hall.


Important Notes:

Premium Spaces are located near the entrance.

Frontage for Small Spaces (3 ft x 6 ft) is 3 ft.

Tables and chairs are available upon request (Large table approx. 6ft x 3ft and small table - approx. 3ft x 3ft).
data.refundPolicy:
Please review the cancellation terms carefully. They are strictly enforced to ensure fairness and operational efficiency.

●     Cancellations before 18th Aug 2026:

 Vendors cancelling after making payment but before 18th March 2026 will receive a refund after deduction of an administrative fee of S $150

●     Cancellations between 19th Aug 2026 and 25th Aug 2026:

  Vendors cancelling within this period will receive a 50% refund of the space booking fee, and an additional admin fee of S$150 will be deducted.

●     Cancellations on or after 26th Aug 2026:

 No refunds will be issued for any reason after this date. This includes both the space booking fee and the Security Deposit.

●     No-Show Policy:

  Vendors who fail to attend Bazaar Day or leave before the pack-up time (8:00 PM) will forfeit the entire payment and the Security Deposit.

●     Breach of Terms:

 Vendors found in violation of any rules or terms outlined in this document will not be eligible for a refund of any kind, including the Security Deposit.
data.termsAndConditions:
●     Submission of the online form is an application to participate, not a guarantee of selection.

●     The IWA Bazaar Team will review all applications, and only approved vendors will be sent an invoice.

●     Participating vendors must be 18 years and above on the day of the event.


Invoicing & Payment

●     Invoice Sent: -22nd July 2026 – 10th Aug 2026

●     Payment Deadline: 10 days from the date of the invoice issued. (2nd Aug 2026 - 20th Aug 2026)


   DO NOT make any payment before receiving an official invoice from IWA (treasurer@iwasingapore.org).

   Full payment of the Space Booking Fee, all add ons and Refundable Security Deposit of S$150.00 is required.

   Please note - The promotions on IWA Social Media platforms will start after the payments are received.

 

Payment Method

●     Preferred modes: Bank Transfer or PayNow (QR Code or UEN)

●     Payment details will be included in the invoice.

 

!IMPORTANT! - for overseas Vendors: If the payment for bazaar is done through any of your contacts in Singapore, then the refund will be deposited in the same account. If the payment has been done through an overseas account, then notify the IWA team.

 

Provide the exact legal name of the company (for refund purposes) in the JotForm — this will be used to issue your security deposit refund cheque.

●     Only the approved business owner and registered staff may operate the booth.

●     Sharing of space is strictly prohibited. Violators will be:Billed separately


Forfeit the security deposit


  • Vendors must be present on Bazaar Day.  FDWs are strictly not allowed.
  • No-shows will forfeit all payments and the security deposit.


Space Pricing and Deposit


  • Pricing depends on stall type, size, and location.
  • Payment includes: Space Booking Fee + Refundable Security Deposit + Additional services (refer to jot form)
  • Amount of Refundable Security Deposit: S$150.00

 

IWA Membership Preference


  • Priority will be given to IWA Members during space allocation.
  • Membership is open only to women residing in Singapore.
  • Updated Annual fee: S$150.00 (1st Jan 2027 – 31st Dec 2027)


To become a member, visit: www.iwasingapore.org

termsAndConditionsforStalls.termsAndConditionsforStalls: I confirm that I am a registered business owner and authorized to do business in Singapore.
If overseas business owner, user invitation letter and apply for business visa to join bazaar.
Allow us to use your Gmail and Whatsapp for marketing our future events.
I understand the penalty of sharing the table with other vendors.
I understand and agree that I can display products from any two categories only.
I understand that as per Singapore regulations for Foreign Domestic Workers (FDW), domestic helpers cannot assist Vendors at their stalls.
I understand that the space allocated by the IWA Bazaar team is final and non-transferable.

customSections.heading: Set up Instructions
customSections.content:
IWA will provide the following to the Vendors


  • Name cards - must be visibly displayed at each booth.
  • An e-flyer - for distribution to their mailing list.
  • Publicity and media promotion for the IWA Summer Bazaar 2026.
  • Water, Tea, Coffee and Biscuits will be provided by IWA
  • Plug point upon request: charged
  • Onsite first aid box, 4 fitting room in the event hall
  • Tables as requested in JotForm along with skirting and chair.
  • Meal coupons of $10 to each participating booth.


Each vendor is responsible for setting up within their space only.


Display racks, mirrors, and vertical displays must not exceed 6 feet in height.


Standees are charged separately and must be placed outside the hall. These spaces are limited and allocated first-come, first-served.


Only two people, aged 18 years and above are allowed to operate a stall.

  • Vendors with multiple spaces may have a maximum of four persons.


Domestic helpers (FDWs) are not allowed to assist at the stall.

  • Violation of this rule will result in immediate removal of the helper from the venue.

     

No materials may be affixed to venue walls, floors, or fixtures of the event hall.


  • Vendors must bring:
  • Their own racks, mirrors, displays, and setup tools
  • Their own trolleys and manpower for setup and pack-up
  • Use the assigned loading & unloading bay for bringing the goods into the hall.


Food is strictly prohibited inside the exhibition hall.


  • Vendors found eating at their booth will be fined S$150.00.
  • Meals can be purchased from the approved caterer and must be eaten in the lounge.
  • SG$10 Meal coupon will be provided per table

customSections.heading: Set up Schedule
customSections.content:
Pre-Setup (Thursday, 10th September 2026)


  • Set-up timing: 7:30 PM - 9:00 PM
  • The venue will be locked at 9:15 PM sharp. No late access will be allowed.
  • Overseas vendors will be responsible for their own food & lodging.
  • After set-up, cleaning up & removal of big boxes, plastic must be done by participating vendors. Housekeeping will only sweep the floor.
  • Suntec and IWA will not be responsible for any damage or loss.


Bazaar Day (Friday, 11th September 2026)


  • Event timing: 10:30 AM – 8:00 PM
  • Vendors unable to set up the night before may do so from 7:30 AM on Bazaar Day.
  • Vendors must arrive on & before 9:00 AM, else IWA reserves the right to not allow the vendor to participate and all fees will be forfeited.
  • Guest of Honour inaugurates and walks the floor at 10:00 AM.
  • Pack-up begins only after 8:00 PM.
  • Early pack-up is strictly prohibited and will result in forfeiture of the security deposit.
  • After 8:00 PM, the IWA Bazaar Team will inspect all stalls.
  • Vendors must submit their sign-out forms before leaving.


Bazaar Day (Friday, 11th September 2026)


  • Event timing: 10:30 AM – 8:00 PM
  • Vendors unable to set up the night before may do so from 7:30 AM on Bazaar Day.
  • Vendors must arrive on & before 9:00 AM, else IWA reserves the right to not allow the vendor to participate and all fees will be forfeited.
  • Guest of Honour inaugurates and walks the floor at 10:00 AM.


Pack-up begins only after 8:00 PM


  • Early pack-up is strictly prohibited and will result in forfeiture of the security deposit.
  • After 8:00 PM, the IWA Bazaar Team will inspect all stalls.
  • Vendors must submit their sign-out forms before leaving.

customSections.heading: PDPA Consent
customSections.content:
By submitting the Vendor Application Form, you agree and consent to the Indian Women’s Association (IWA), Singapore, collecting, using, disclosing, and processing your Personal Data for the purposes of:


  • Evaluating and processing your application for participation in IWA Festive Bazaar 2026.
  • Administering logistics, invoicing, payments, and promotional communication related to the Bazaar.
  • Sending you future updates, promotional material, and marketing communications related to IWA’s activities and events.
  • Publicity and documentation of IWA Bazaar through photography and videography.


You further agree that:


  • IWA may disclose your Personal Data to government authorities or third parties if required by law or for legal/administrative purposes.
  • IWA may store and process your Personal Data securely, in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act 2012 (PDPA).


For the purpose of clarity, “Personal Data” includes all data as defined in the PDPA, including all details submitted through the registration form.

customSections.heading: Disclaimer
customSections.content:
The Indian Women’s Association reserves the right to approve or decline any vendor application, determine stall location, and limit the number of vendors in any product category to ensure diversity and balance at the Bazaar.


  • All sales transactions and commercial engagements during the event are strictly between the vendor and the customer.
  • IWA holds no responsibility or liability for any damage, loss or disputes, payment issues, or claims that may arise.
  • Vendors are encouraged to issue receipts for all transactions and must include their business name and contact information on the receipt.
  • IWA is not liable for any theft, damage, loss of goods, or injury occurring during the event. All vendors participate at their own risk.
  • Vendors are strongly advised to arrange their own insurance coverage, including but not limited to:
  • Public liability insurance
  • Health/accident insurance
  • Insurance for merchandise and equipment
  • IWA reserves the right to cancel the event due to unforeseen circumstances. In such a case, the maximum liability of IWA will be limited to the stall rental fee paid by the vendor.
  •  The Security Deposit will be refunded where appropriate. No further claims will be entertained.
